steps.title: Identify the comparative signal
steps.content: The word “improve” establishes that CSR efforts have a positive effect — when CSR was mentioned, favorability scores should be higher than when CSR wasn't mentioned.

steps.title: Apply the signal to find the correct word
steps.content:
The target is a word meaning “surpass” or “be higher than.” “Exceed” precisely captures this — the scores with CSR mentioned surpassed those without it.

The other three are contextually impossible: “identify” doesn't apply to comparing numerical values, “disturb” means to cause trouble (incompatible with favorability scores), and “replace” misses the comparison.

D is correct.
